prompt: Visualize 'Build Your Legacy' as striking, polished gold 3D sans-serif lettering. This powerful statement is set before a crisp abstract geometric design in navy and gold, creating a strong brand feel.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of the phrase 'Build Your Legacy' rendered as striking, polished 3D gold sans-serif lettering, centrally positioned. This typography is set before a crisp abstract geometric design, composed of sharp lines and shapes in deep navy blue and rich gold tones. The overall composition should project a powerful and sophisticated brand identity.
